title: 'Concentration of curry': Singapore blocks 14 anti-Indian posts likely from China
summary_full: Singapore has ordered YouTube, Facebook, and X to block 14 posts targeting its Indian community and multiculturalism. The Ministry of Home Affairs stated the content, originating from overseas and likely China, aimed to sow discord by attacking the nation's multiracial society. These actions underscore Singapore's commitment to social cohesion and opposition to xenophobia.
